g.title: M_GATE
g.text: • If n is small: roughly normal (or no extreme outliers)
• If n is large: CLT often ok

g.title: C_GATE
g.text: • If 2×2 and expected counts are small: Fisher exact

g.title: CHI
g.text: (2×2 with small expected counts: Fisher exact)

g.title: QQ
g.text: Regression slope test (t test on β₁)
